description: Click N Start provides wheelchair accessible taxis in Indiranagar for seamless and stress-free travel. Our vehicles are equipped with automatic hydraulic lifts, ensuring safe boarding for both manual and electric wheelchair users—perfect for medical visits, shopping, or daily travel.
